category_sources: source_facts.description: General Search And Replace on files; official/archive documentation describes GSAR as a utility for searching and optionally replacing strings in text and binary files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gsar; source_facts.description expands it as General Search And Replace.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project homepage; source_facts.source-archive is the official release archive, but no dedicated official docs URL was confirmed.
repo_sources: No official source-control project URL was found in source_facts; source_facts.source-archive is a release ZIP, not a source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies search-and-replace functionality; package description and archive naming indicate file-oriented CLI usage.
